mapper.select:
SELECT si.inventory_id, si.store_id, si.variant_id, si.quantity, si.min_quantity, si.updated_at, st.name AS store_name, p.name AS product_name, p.category, p.brand, v.color, v.size, v.material, v.sku, CASE WHEN si.quantity < si.min_quantity THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS low_stock FROM store_inventory si INNER JOIN stores st ON st.store_id = si.store_id INNER JOIN product_variants v ON v.variant_id = si.variant_id INNER JOIN products p ON p.product_id = v.product_id
AND si.store_id = #{storeId} AND p.category = #{category} AND si.quantity < si.min_quantity
ORDER BY p.name, v.sku OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM store_inventory si INNER JOIN product_variants v ON v.variant_id = si.variant_id INNER JOIN products p ON p.product_id = v.product_id
AND si.store_id = #{storeId} AND p.category = #{category} AND si.quantity < si.min_quantity

SELECT si.inventory_id, si.store_id, si.variant_id, si.quantity, si.min_quantity, si.updated_at, st.name AS store_name, p.name AS product_name, p.category, p.brand, v.color, v.size, v.material, v.sku, 1 AS low_stock FROM store_inventory si INNER JOIN stores st ON st.store_id = si.store_id INNER JOIN product_variants v ON v.variant_id = si.variant_id INNER JOIN products p ON p.product_id = v.product_id WHERE si.quantity < si.min_quantity AND si.store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY si.quantity ASC
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO store_inventory AS target USING (SELECT #{storeId} AS store_id, #{variantId} AS variant_id) AS source ON (target.store_id = source.store_id AND target.variant_id = source.variant_id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET quantity = #{quantity}, min_quantity = #{minQuantity}, updated_at = GETDATE() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (store_id, variant_id, quantity, min_quantity, updated_at) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{variantId}, #{quantity}, #{minQuantity}, GETDATE());
